task: A bat and a ball cost $1.10 together. The bat costs $1.00 more than the ball. How much is the ball?
If all Bloops are Razzies and all Razzies are Lazzies, are all Bloops definitely Lazzies? Explain.
A farmer has 17 sheep. All but 9 run away. How many are left?
Write a Python function that returns the n-th Fibonacci number iteratively in O(n) time and O(1) space.
Write a Python function to check whether a string is a valid palindrome, ignoring case and non-alphanumeric characters.
Implement an LRU cache class in Python with get and put in O(1) average time.
Write a 3-sentence product description for a reusable stainless-steel water bottle aimed at hikers.
List three trade-offs of using microservices instead of a monolith, with one sentence each.
